name: HWR_GBL_PRFL_SKILL_STMT
description: Table storing weight of each statement, it is used to calculate the score in GBL_PRFL_SKILL table.

columns.Name: GBL_PRFL_SKILL_STMNT_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the global profile skill table

columns.Name: STATEMENT_UUID
columns.Comments: The universally unique identifier for this statement.

columns.Name: GBL_PRFL_SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: The user skill Id. This is a foreign key from the HWR_GBL_PRFL_SKILL tables.

columns.Name: STATEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: The Unique database identifier for this statement.

columns.Name: WEIGHT
columns.Comments: Weight contributed by the statement to the user skill score

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
